creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

This is tracked in PR 260402, BUILD_DEPENDS and LIB_DEPENDS have wrong ordering (see Porters Handbook) and you only need to refence one file for LIB_DEPENDS if it's the same port. We're also looking into switch to CMake due to consumers of re2. On top of that there are a few consumers that needs to be patched before we can commit a version that uses Abseil. To make it easier to track I'll close this PR.

Best regards,
Daniel

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 206402 ***
